title: polystichum munitum subsp. incisoserratum
intro: Polystichum munitum subsp. incisoserratum, also known as the Western sword fern, is a subspecies of the Polystichum munitum fern species native to the Pacific Northwest region of North America. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine, with its medicinal properties attributed to the presence of various bioactive compounds, including flavonoids, phenolic acids, and saponins. The health benefits of Polystichum munitum subsp. incisoserratum are said to include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties, which may help to alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues, such as asthma and bronchitis. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, tinctures, or infusions, which are often used to treat various health conditions, although it is essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using any herbal remedy.
